task_objective: Reset the SDH-ludusavi QAM panel to the top on open while preserving alwaysRender, and prefer the current SteamOS running game in the dropdown when it matches a Ludusavi game.
design_decisions: Kept alwaysRender enabled because onDismount unregisters app lifetime notifications, clears fallback polling, clears active sessions, clears status timers, and destroys the BrowserView status surface.
Used @decky/api useQuickAccessVisible to detect QAM open transitions and reset the nearest scrollable parent plus the plugin root element.
Used Router.MainRunningApp as the current-game source, matching by Steam app id first and normalized display name second.
Current-game autopopulation updates the visible dropdown selection without calling setSelectedGameCall; manual dropdown changes remain the only persisted selection path.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_frontend_static.py failed with the new scroll/current-game assertions before implementation
results.pnpm_verify: passed after rerunning with network access because the sandboxed pnpm audit failed with EAI_AGAIN
